productDisplayName: Puma Men Pack of 3 Sports Socks
description: Pack of three pairsWear these super comfy socks to keep your feet cosy. puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Warm ankle length socks in white, black and greyMade of 78% cotton and 22% nylonBig chunky rib at opening to grip above ankle with contrast tipsThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitTerry-towelling inner for extreme comfort and warmthCareMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
